_doc: Mocked public-safe BPMN operate: read incidents first, then retry.

rules.match: maestro bpmn instance incidents inst-triage-001 -f folder-public
maestro bpmn instance incidents inst-triage-001 --folder-key folder-public
maestro bpmn instance retry inst-triage-001 -f folder-public
maestro bpmn instance retry inst-triage-001 --folder-key folder-public
